name: Baja Seafood Stew
recipeIngredient: 28 ounces Italian plum tomatoes; whole and uncooked
1 pound fish; such as cod, sea bass, mahimahi or red snapper; cut into 1-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Use 28 ounces of whole Italian plum tomatoes that are undrained and halved.
2. The following types of fish can be used: fillets of cod, sea bass, mahimahi, or red snapper, cut into 1-inch pieces.
3. Thaw and drain the crabmeat, removing any cartilage before using.
